name: Order-Status-and-Tracking-V1.docx
content:
How do I check the status of my order or get a tracking number?

To check your order status, contact the C.E. King support team with your order number or invoice number. Tracking information is provided once goods have been dispatched.

Details

  • Email support@ceking.com with your order or invoice number
  • Include your company name for faster lookup
  • If your order is overdue, the team will investigate and provide an update
  • For spare parts orders, typical processing time is 3-5 business days before dispatch
  • For machine orders, lead times vary and are confirmed at time of quotation
  • If you have not received a response within 2 business days, please follow up or use the website chat

Link: https://www.ceking.com/pages/contact
